'''S'diawae''' was a famous [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] sometime between the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]] and the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], a period known as the [[Golden Age of the Old Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], S'diawae had gained the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] with distinction. Postmortem, Master S'diawae was recognized by the [[Biscuit Baron]] corporation during the time of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], a political schism threatening the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] during its final decade. As part of a campaign to boost patriotism and historical recognition, Biscuit Baron released commemorative [[Holocube/Legends|holocubes]] of Master S'diawae in their [[QuickSnack]] and [[QuickSnackLite]] bundles.<ref name="HNN49" />

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|business/13328_2.html|Biscuit Baron to Celebrate "Heroes of the Republic"}} {{1stm}}
